blocks.text: Real Madrid's title siege: nine points down, seven games left

Barcelona sit nine points clear with seven games left — mathematically alive, but Los Blancos must win every remaining fixture. Tonight, a desperate Alavés side fighting relegation makes this anything but a routine home win.
⚽ Tue 19:00 — Valencia vs Mallorca — relegation six-pointer, both clubs in serious danger
🎮 Thu 17:00 — 100 Thieves vs BIG, CCT Global Finals — rain carries Norway's hopes in Portugal
